plan_adherence_notes: The branch does not execute the plan. Relative to `ff/Tbayes-market-i6y-execute-step-3`, `git diff --stat -- backend/server.py tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` is empty, so none of the planned product work landed. `backend/server.py` still serializes the old four-field `/positions` row without `unrealizedPnl`, `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` still freezes that pre-P&L shape in `test_get_account_positions_serializes_minimal_lexically_sorted_live_rows_and_route_parity`, and repository search finds no added replay-helper regressions for deterministic fill ordering, missing-history fallback, weighted-average accumulation, partial-close survivors, or sign-flip survivors. The focused gate from the plan passes unchanged, but it only validates the baseline branch state rather than the intended implementation.
reason: Reject. The research and plan are coherent, but execution never happened on this branch: only task artifacts were added, the serialized `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` contract was not extended to include `unrealizedPnl`, the replay-helper coverage was not added, and there is no product diff to audit for contract safety. Verification result: `python3 -m pytest -v --tb=short tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketApiUnitTests::test_root_route_returns_service_index tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` passed with 15 tests, confirming only the existing baseline.
